IR Iran World Cup 2026 Form and Qualifying Results
IR Iran's last five completed internationals include W 5-0 vs Costa Rica, L 1-2 vs Nigeria and D 0-0 vs Uzbekistan. IR Iran have 2 wins, 2 draws and 1 loss across their last 5 completed matches. Form helps, but friendlies, qualifiers and tournament matches are not the same test.

IR Iran World Cup 2026 Squad, Fixtures and Group
IR Iran play New Zealand, Belgium and Egypt in Group G. They are #21 in the FIFA Men's World Ranking, close enough to be judged against the stronger teams in the field. Amir Ghalenoei leads the squad planning for these fixtures. FIFA history records list 6 previous World Cup appearances before 2026.
By position, there are 8 defenders, 10 midfielders and 5 attackers, so midfield options is the first area to compare. Mehdi Taremi, Ehsan Hajsafi and Alireza Jahanbakhsh give the list some familiar starting points for the active tournament roster. That balance will matter in possession, defensive recovery and the moments when chances are scarce.
IR Iran's group schedule reaches Los Angeles and Seattle, so venue planning is part of match preparation. IR Iran open against New Zealand on Jun 16, 2026 at Los Angeles Stadium in Los Angeles. The 26-player list is the squad base, with injuries, registration changes and matchday availability still worth checking. The confirmed 26-player roster is active on the field, with matches currently ongoing.

IR Iran face New Zealand, Belgium and Egypt in Group G. By FIFA ranking, Belgium look like the toughest test, but a three-match group still rewards consistency against every side.
Matchday 1 opponent
New Zealand
New Zealand are the opening group opponent for IR Iran, with the match set for Jun 16, 2026 at Los Angeles Stadium in Los Angeles. FIFA rank #85 is a useful marker, but the match will still come down to availability, tempo and set-piece control.

IR Iran World Cup 2026 TV Guide and Live Stream Info
IR Iran's fixtures are paired with major viewing markets, with final channel choices left open until listings appear.
United States - English
FOX Sports / FS1
FOX Sports holds United States English-language rights. Final listings decide FOX or FS1 placement.
United States - Spanish
Telemundo / Peacock
Spanish-language coverage in the United States is carried by Telemundo platforms. Streaming availability and match allocation can vary by package.
Canada
CTV / TSN / RDS
TSN and CTV serve English viewers in Canada. RDS serves French-language coverage.
United Kingdom
BBC / ITV
BBC and ITV share UK World Cup rights. Final schedules decide each match channel.
Official digital
FIFA match centre / FIFA+
Official FIFA channels carry fixtures, highlights, replays and match information. Live streaming availability depends on your territory.

IR Iran World Cup 2026 Tickets and Matchday Information
IR Iran ticket checks are easiest when the official portal comes first, followed by opponent, venue, date, price status and travel rules.
1
Start at FIFA.com/tickets
Check the official FIFA ticket portal first. The Last-Minute Sales Phase and official resale/exchange access are handled there, with tickets released subject to availability.
2
Use official resale only
If a match is sold out, look for the FIFA Resale/Exchange Marketplace through the same portal. Avoid social media sellers and unofficial resale links.
3
Match your ticket to the fixture
Confirm the match number, opponent, host city, venue and kickoff time before buying. Knockout fixtures can depend on final group position.
4
Check travel and entry rules
A match ticket does not replace passport, visa or border-entry requirements for Canada, Mexico or the United States.
World Cup 2026 ticket price guide
Ticket optionPrice / statusWhat it meansBuyer note
Standard match tickets Live price in FIFA portal Sold by match, seat category and availability. Check the current price at checkout before making travel plans.
Supporter Entry Tier USD 60 FIFA announced this tier for fans of qualified teams, subject to allocation rules and availability. This is not the same as every public ticket category.
Official resale / exchange Listing price varies Available only when sellers list tickets through FIFA's official resale/exchange system. Avoid unofficial resale links, social media sellers and screenshots.
Hospitality packages Package pricing varies Premium matchday access, seating and inclusions are sold separately from standard tickets. Compare package terms, venue access and included services carefully.
What to check before paying
Match number and opponent
Seat category and exact currency
Service fees, taxes or delivery rules shown at checkout
Refund, transfer and resale terms
Travel cost to the host city and stadium
Whether the match is group stage or knockout/TBD

Before you buy or travel
Ticket availability is not guaranteed. Prices, categories, seat maps and purchase limits are shown inside the official FIFA portal.
Follow FIFA mobile-ticket instructions when they are issued for your order, including transfer rules for guests.
Check stadium bag policy, gate opening times, transport options and local weather close to matchday.
For premium matchday access, use FIFA hospitality channels rather than third-party offers.
Official ticket source: FIFA.com/tickets. Keep the buying checklist beside the fixture details, then use the official portal when you are ready to check live availability and prices.

IR Iran World Cup 2026 FAQ
Short answers for squad status, fixtures, group opponents, venues, availability, tickets and TV planning.
What group are IR Iran in at World Cup 2026?
IR Iran are in Group G with New Zealand, Belgium and Egypt. The group table and standings are updated live after each official match result.
Who are IR Iran's World Cup 2026 opponents?
IR Iran face New Zealand, Belgium and Egypt in the group stage, with each match tied to its date, city, venue and opponent profile.
Where can I see IR Iran kickoff times?
Fixture cards and the schedule table show each kickoff. The timezone selector converts every listed time into your chosen country or exact timezone.
Has IR Iran announced a World Cup 2026 squad?
Yes. The official IR Iran 26-player squad is fully confirmed for the tournament, with the list updated on 8 June 2026 to reflect the latest squad data.
Where does the IR Iran squad information come from?
Squad information comes directly from official team registration records and was updated on 8 June 2026 during the tournament.
Which IR Iran players are highlighted?
Highlighted players come from the current squad list. Their profiles show verified roles, caps and goals.
What does the IR Iran position map show?
The position map groups selected players by goalkeeper, defence, midfield and attack. It does not predict a lineup.
Does this list IR Iran injuries and match availability?
Yes. Availability notes cover injury issue, return date and match status when verified news exists. Blank fields mean no reliable update has been added.
Which venues host IR Iran in the group stage?
IR Iran are scheduled at Los Angeles Stadium and Seattle Stadium, with city and stadium details beside each match.
Where are more IR Iran tournament details?
The group table, schedule, stadium, ticket and TV sections contain related tournament details.

Checked on June 20, 2026. Squad status, fixture details, kickoff times and completed match results are reviewed separately during the tournament.
